name: Wuk Lamat | FFXIV Dawntrail
description:
You journey across the lands of Yok Tural with none other then the third promise and potential future Dawnservant of Tural! After the first ceremony blessing all the potential future rulers, you and her head through Tuliyollal to stock up on whatever you may need on the journey ahead.


From Final Fantasy 14 Dawntrail
Please leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
